chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 722 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.6412/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.3250/2025 (Ex.A) 4. For hearing of main case 25-09-2025 Petitioner Abdul Hameed Chohan present in person >>>>>..<<<<< Petitioner present in person submits that his Mercy Appeal (available at page 15) is pending before the Respondent No.2 / Chairman, NADRA, which has not been decided. Mr. Asadullah Rajper, learned Assistant Attorney General present in connection with other matters waives notice of the instant Constitutional Petition and submits that Respondent No.2 will decide the Mercy Appeal preferred by the Petitioner within a shortest possible time. Under the circumstances, the instant Constitutional Petition is disposed of along with all pending applications with direction to the Respondent No.2 / Chairman, NADRA to decide the Mercy Appeal preferred by the Petitioner within 30 (thirty) days, if pending, after providing opportunity of hearing to all concerned in accordance with the law. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
